title: aneilema beniniense subsp. sessiliflorum
intro: Aneilema beniniense subsp. sessiliflorum, also known as the Sessile-flowered Aneilema, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is a plant traditionally used in African folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Aneilema beniniense subsp. sessiliflorum include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, or topical treatments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
